name: Paracetamol
usage: Relieves mild to moderate pain, headache, toothache, body ache, and reduces fever.

name: Ibuprofen
usage: Treats pain, inflammation, arthritis, menstrual cramps, headache, and dental pain.

name: Amoxicillin
usage: Treats bacterial infections of ear, nose, throat, urinary tract, skin, and lower respiratory tract.

name: Azithromycin
usage: Treats respiratory infections, skin infections, ear infections, and sexually transmitted diseases.

name: Cetirizine
usage: Relieves allergy symptoms: sneezing, runny nose, itchy/watery eyes, hives, and itching.

name: Montelukast
usage: Prevents asthma attacks and relieves symptoms of seasonal allergies (allergic rhinitis).

name: Metformin
usage: First-line treatment for type 2 diabetes. Controls blood sugar levels by decreasing glucose production in liver.

name: Glimepiride
usage: Stimulates the pancreas to produce more insulin. Used in type 2 diabetes when metformin alone is insufficient.

name: Omeprazole
usage: Treats acidity, heartburn, gastroesophageal reflux (GERD), peptic ulcers, and Zollinger-Ellison syndrome.

name: Pantoprazole
usage: Reduces stomach acid production. Treats GERD, erosive esophagitis, and stomach ulcers.

name: Amlodipine
usage: Treats high blood pressure (hypertension) and chest pain (angina) by relaxing blood vessels.

name: Telmisartan
usage: Treats hypertension and protects kidneys in diabetic patients. Reduces risk of stroke and heart attack.

name: Atorvastatin
usage: Lowers bad cholesterol (LDL) and triglycerides. Reduces risk of heart attack and stroke.

name: Aspirin
usage: Low-dose: Prevents heart attacks and strokes. High-dose: Relieves pain, fever, and inflammation.

name: Ciprofloxacin
usage: Treats urinary tract infections, respiratory infections, gastrointestinal infections, and bone/joint infections.

name: Metronidazole
usage: Treats infections caused by anaerobic bacteria and parasites including amoebiasis, giardiasis, and dental infections.

name: Levothyroxine
usage: Replacement therapy for hypothyroidism (underactive thyroid). Take on empty stomach 30 min before food.

name: Salbutamol
usage: Quick-relief inhaler for asthma and COPD. Opens airways during asthma attacks and exercise-induced bronchospasm.

name: Diclofenac
usage: Treats moderate pain, joint pain, arthritis, gout, post-surgical pain, and menstrual cramps.

name: Ranitidine
usage: Reduces stomach acid production. Treats duodenal ulcers, gastric ulcers, and GERD.

name: Losartan
usage: Treats hypertension and diabetic kidney disease. Reduces stroke risk in patients with heart enlargement.

name: Domperidone
usage: Relieves nausea, vomiting, bloating, and feeling of fullness. Improves stomach motility.

name: Clopidogrel
usage: Prevents blood clots after heart attack, stroke, or in people with peripheral arterial disease.

name: Fluconazole
usage: Treats fungal infections including candidiasis (oral thrush, vaginal yeast infection), and cryptococcal meningitis.

name: ORS (Oral Rehydration Salts)
usage: Prevents and treats dehydration caused by diarrhea, vomiting, or excessive sweating.
